caveats: Join on both postal prefix and state. Coordinates are source observations, not customer-level street addresses.

definition: Sum of item prices excluding freight.
caveats: Use this as the default product-sales metric; the dataset has no tax or refund table.

definition: Amount captured in source payment rows.
caveats: May differ slightly from item-plus-freight totals; inspect reconciliation fields.
Do not count item rows as orders.
quantity is 1 for every source item row.

definition: Average gross item-plus-freight value per order.
caveats: State merchandise-only explicitly when freight should be excluded.

definition: Order whose source status is delivered.
caveats: Status-based; actual delivery timestamp can be separately checked.

definition: Order whose source status is canceled.
caveats: Unavailable is a separate source status.
Use customer_unique_id, not the order-scoped customer_id.

definition: Shopper with more than one source order.
caveats: Deduplicate by customer_unique_id when counting repeat shoppers.

definition: Actual customer delivery after the source estimate.
caveats: Null when actual delivery timestamp is absent.

definition: Elapsed days from purchase to actual customer delivery.
caveats: Exclude nulls; inspect chronology_anomaly_flag before modeling.

definition: Freight divided by gross order value.
caveats: At item grain use line freight and line total.
Some orders have no review; multiple review rows are averaged.

definition: Highest-value payment method for an order.
Most recent complete calendar quarter within the selected date context.
canonical_sql: calendar quarter using dates.year and dates.quarter_number
caveats: The application should state the resolved date range as an assumption.

definition: Ambiguous term mapped by default to merchandise revenue.
caveats: Expose the assumption; use gross order value when freight is explicitly included.
